---

title: "D02_04: DNA Integration"
subtitle: "Join filtered customer views with D01 DNA profiles"
parent: "D02_filtered_customer_views"
chapter: "CH12"
category: "derivation-task"
number: "D02_04"
date-created: "2025-12-24"
date-modified: "2025-12-24"
author: "Claude"
type: "derivation-task"
depends_on:
  - "D02_03_customer_views"
  - "D01_dna_analysis"
outputs_to:
  - "app_data.df_customer_complete_{condition_key}"
implements:
  - "DM_R051": "Single Task per Derivation Step"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: false
---

# D02_04: DNA Integration {#overview}

This task integrates the filtered customer aggregation views (from D02_03) with the D01 DNA profiles to create complete customer views for application consumption.

## DNA Integration Pattern (NSQL) {#dna-integration}

```nsql
# D02_04: Integrate Filtered Views with DNA Profiles [Layer: 5NM]
INTEGRATE_DNA D02_04:
  FOR EACH condition IN condition_grids:
    # Final output to app_data has no suffix
    view_name: "df_customer_complete_" + condition.condition_key

    # Join filtered customer view (4CL) with DNA data
    # Output to 5NM app_data (no suffix)
    CREATE VIEW app_data.{view_name} AS:
      FROM cleansed_data.filtered.df_sales_by_customer_{condition.condition_key}___cleansed AS fc
      LEFT JOIN app_data.df_dna_by_customer AS dna
        ON fc.customer_id = dna.customer_id
        AND dna.platform_id = PLATFORM_ID_FROM(condition.source_filter)

      SELECT:
        # From filtered customer view (D02_03)
        fc.customer_id
        fc.transaction_count
        fc.total_spent
        fc.first_purchase_date
        fc.last_purchase_date
        fc.average_order_value
        fc.distinct_products

        # From DNA profile (D01)
        dna.r_value, dna.r_label
        dna.f_value, dna.f_label
        dna.m_value, dna.m_label
        dna.nes_status
        dna.cai, dna.cai_label
        dna.dna_segment
        dna.clv

        # Filter conditions
        fc.source_filter
        fc.time_condition
        fc.product_line_id_filter
        fc.state_filter

    # Layer 5NM: Final output to app_data (no suffix)
    LOG "Created complete customer view: {view_name}"
```

**Layer**: 5NM (Normalize) - Per MP144, final app_data output has no suffix.

## DNA Metrics Integration {#dna-metrics}

| DNA Metric | Source | Description |
|------------|--------|-------------|
| `r_value`, `r_label` | D01 | Recency score and label |
| `f_value`, `f_label` | D01 | Frequency score and label |
| `m_value`, `m_label` | D01 | Monetary score and label |
| `nes_status` | D01 | New/Existing/Sleeping status |
| `cai`, `cai_label` | D01 | Customer Activity Index |
| `dna_segment` | D01 | DNA segment classification |
| `clv` | D01 | Customer Lifetime Value |

## Platform ID Mapping (NSQL) {#platform-mapping}

```nsql
# Map source_filter to platform_id for DNA join
FUNCTION PLATFORM_ID_FROM(source_filter):
  CASE source_filter
    WHEN 'amazon' THEN 1
    WHEN 'ebay' THEN 2
    WHEN 'retail' THEN 3
    WHEN 'cbz' THEN 4
  END
```

## Output View Schema {#output-schema}

```nsql
# Complete customer view structure
SCHEMA df_customer_complete_{condition_key}:
  COLUMNS:
    # Customer identification
    customer_id: VARCHAR NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY

    # From D02_03 (aggregation)
    transaction_count: INTEGER NOT NULL
    first_purchase_date: DATE
    last_purchase_date: DATE
    total_spent: NUMERIC
    average_order_value: NUMERIC
    distinct_products: INTEGER

    # From D01 (DNA)
    r_value: INTEGER
    r_label: VARCHAR
    f_value: INTEGER
    f_label: VARCHAR
    m_value: INTEGER
    m_label: VARCHAR
    nes_status: VARCHAR
    cai: NUMERIC
    cai_label: VARCHAR
    dna_segment: VARCHAR
    clv: NUMERIC

    # Filter conditions
    source_filter: VARCHAR NOT NULL
    time_condition: VARCHAR NOT NULL
    product_line_id_filter: INTEGER NOT NULL
    state_filter: VARCHAR NOT NULL

  TYPE: VIRTUAL VIEW
```

## Validation (NSQL) {#validation}

```nsql
# D02_04: Validate DNA Integration
VALIDATE D02_04:
  FOR EACH condition IN condition_grids:
    view_name: "df_customer_complete_" + condition.condition_key

    CHECK view_exists:
      ASSERT: EXISTS(app_data.{view_name})

    CHECK dna_coverage:
      # Count customers with DNA profiles
      dna_count: COUNT(*) FROM app_data.{view_name} WHERE dna_segment IS NOT NULL
      total_count: COUNT(*) FROM app_data.{view_name}
      coverage: dna_count / total_count
      LOG: "DNA coverage for {view_name}: {coverage * 100}%"

    CHECK join_integrity:
      # Ensure no duplicate customers from join
      QUERY: "SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) FROM {view_name} GROUP BY customer_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1"
      ASSERT: COUNT(*) = 0
      MESSAGE: "Each customer_id must be unique after join"

  ON_SUCCESS: LOG "D02_04 completed: all DNA integrations created"
```

## Data Flow Diagram {#data-flow}

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────┐     ┌─────────────────────────┐
│ D02_03 [Layer: 4CL]                 │     │ D01                     │
│ df_sales_by_customer_*___cleansed   │     │ df_dna_by_customer         │
│ (cleansed_data)                     │     │ (app_data)              │
└────────────────┬────────────────────┘     └───────────┬─────────────┘
                 │                                      │
                 └───────────────┬──────────────────────┘
                                 │
                            LEFT JOIN
                            ON customer_id
                            AND platform_id
                                 │
                                 ▼
                 ┌─────────────────────────┐
                 │ D02_04 [Layer: 5NM]     │
                 │ df_customer_complete_*  │
                 │ (app_data, no suffix)   │
                 └─────────────────────────┘
```

## Related Documentation

- [D02_03_customer_views.qmd](D02_03_customer_views.qmd) - Customer aggregation (upstream)
- [D02_05_execution.qmd](D02_05_execution.qmd) - Execution flow
- [D01_dna_analysis](../D01_dna_analysis/index.qmd) - DNA profile source
